DragDrop

Syntax 1: For ListBox, PictureListBox, ListView, and Tab controls

Occurs when the user drags an object onto the control and releases the mouse button to drop the object.

Event ID

Event IDObject
pbm_lbndragdropListBox, PictureListBox
pbm_lvndragdropListView
pbm_tcndragdropTab

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
sourceDragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)
indexInteger by value (the index of the target ListView item)

Syntax 2: For TreeView controls

Occurs when the user drags an object onto the control and releases the mouse button to drop the object.

Event ID

Event IDObject
pbm_tvndragdropTreeView

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
sourceDragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)
handleLong by value (the handle of the target TreeView item)

Syntax 3: For CheckBox and CommandButton controls

Occurs when the user drags an object onto the control and releases the mouse button to drop the object.

Event ID

Event IDObject
pbm_cbndragdropCheckBox
pbm_bnndragdropCommandButton

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
sourceDragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)
xposInteger by value (the horizontal drop coordinate)
yposInteger by value (the vertical drop coordinate)
